Climate change will be a 'really big' focus for ESG investors in 2021, market analyst says
ESG Investing Boom Is Bullish For Cleantech
Sustainable investment funds just surpassed $1 trillion for the first time on record
Woke funds are having a moment as Millennials invest more
ESG index funds are hot. That may be a risky thing for investors

holdings.infoBox: ESGV is an equity ETF with a total of 1249 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.36%, Apple at 7.60%, Microsoft at 5.65%, Amazon.com at 4.39%, and Alphabet at 3.74%.

overview.description: The Vanguard ESG U.S. Stock ETF (ESGV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE USA All Cap Choice index, a market-cap-weighted index of US all-cap companies screened for environmental, social, and corporate governance (ESG) criteria. ESGV was launched on Sep 18, 2018 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: FTSE USA All Cap Choice Index

data.text: Michaela Edwards, Capricorn Investment Group partner, joins 'Closing Bell' to discuss ESG investing and the outflow of funds from the sector in the last few months.

data.title: ESG assets keep climbing despite pushback. What's ahead for the industry, per one strategist
data.text: Mona Naqvi, senior director and head of ESG strategy for North America at S&P Dow Jones Indices, lays out the catalysts to watch for Environmental, Social and Governance-themed investments.

data.text: As evidence of the growing popularity of sustainable investing, 2 leading ETFs that follow ESG criteria have reached new 52-week highs.

data.text: Index ETFs that use an ESG (environmental, social and governance) screening process for stock selection are beating the S&P 500 return this year, but that is not proof that ESG is a proven investment ...
